nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blyth's hornbill
nodes.summary: Blyth's hornbill（Blyth's hornbill，学名 Rhyticeros plicatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 美拉尼西亚
nodes.summary: 美拉尼西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Stephan's emerald dove、Blyth's hornbill、Sacred kingfisher等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Lincoln Park Zoo
nodes.summary: Lincoln Park Zoo是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Blyth's hornbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.evidence: thumb|Wild blyth's Hornbill male passing fruit to mate Blyth's hornbill (Rhyticeros plicatus), also known as the Papuan hornbill, is a large hornbill inhabiting the forest canopy in Wallacea and Melanesia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Wild blyth's Hornbill male passing fruit to mate Blyth's hornbill (Rhyticeros plicatus), also known as the Papuan hornbill, is a large hornbill inhabiting the forest canopy in Wallacea and Melanesia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is the only hornbill species native to New Guinea, and one of the largest flying birds of the region. There have also been rare reported sightings on the Saibai and Boigu Islands in the Torres Strait, Queensland, Australia. Its diet consists mainly of fruits, especially figs, occasionally supplemented with insects and other small animals. The Papuan hornbill nests in a large tree hollow in the rainforest, from at least up to above the ground

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Still widespread throughout its large range, the Papuan hornbill is assessed as least concern on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. However, it is subject to hunting pressure by some tribal groups, who use its feathers in headdresses, its bill as a personal adornment, and the lower mandible as a spear point
